name: Snake Charmer Pungi
description: Notes This lute sacrifices Inspired effect for a flat +7 SPD and Speedy effect on activation. However, it retains the active defense bonus from tiered lutes. The combined speed and defense it grants make it ideal for rushing dungeons.
effects: Party Effect: Within 4.5 squares DEF Boost (+4 DEF) for 5 seconds On self: Speedy for 4 seconds
